# Loyalty Program Signup

Joining the loyalty program is free, takes about two minutes, and is done from account settings; point accrual begins on the next purchase. Two Source documents describe the same signup flow in different wording; this page consolidates them.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#how-to-join]
[Source: membership_faq.md#joining-the-program]
